content: Would love to see EIP/ERC numbering automated by AI.

author: draganrakita
content: Before every devnet, do deep code comparison review between clients, this should flush out some bugs out there

author: poojaranjan
content: `Review Assistant` will be a nice addition to triage PRs to be reviewed by Editors.

author: spencer_tb
content:
This is something I want... When an EIP is CFI'd, an EELS specs PR is automatically drafted. Underspecification is becomes clear. If specified clearly, the EELS specs is used to fill for all existing tests to determine incompatibilities with other EIPs. Testing complexity can then be AI augmented here. If it is underspecified, an issue could be drafted stating what is underspecified. I imagine a similar approach can be done on the CL.

Having this would allow us to know, a) how underspecified an EIP is and b) how complex the testing will be, considerably faster than what we do currently. Allowing us to make more targeted decisions.

author: sky.cactus
content: I want to see a fully vibe coded client (maybe even ralphed) so we can show people how valuable having human core devs is.  ...and when the ralphed client is better than all of the other clients, we know it is time to fire all of the core devs.  😬

author: m0_ox
content: An entire collaborative AI team, with different models represented, that maintains a client - reviews, agrees on, and merges each others' PRs, submits updates to the spec repo if necessary.
